name: Crepe Tower
recipeIngredient: 24 crepes (make above recipe in a double batch)
1 package thawed frozen chopped spinach, (10 ounces) squeezed dry and cooked with clove, minced garlic in 2 tablespoons olive oil - with or without 1/2 cup slivered smoked ham or Proscuitto
1 cup Ricotta cheese mixed with 1 egg and 1/2 cup slivered roasted peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly butter a 9-inch deep pie plate.
3. Center a crepe in the bottom of the dish.
4. Mix the spinach filling with 1/2 cup of the cheese sauce and spread some over the first crepe.
5. Center another crepe on top of the spinach filling.
6. Spread the ricotta cheese and pepper filling over this crepe.
7. Continue layering crepes, alternating between spinach mixture and ricotta mixture, until you end with a crepe covering the top.
8. Spoon the remaining cheese sauce over the top of the tower.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until bubbling hot. If assembled in advance and cooled, bake for an additional 15 minutes to heat through.
